leadText: The Wishing Chip (Japanese: ねがいのかけら Wishing Fragment) is an item introduced in Generation VIII. It is currently unobtainable.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Wishing Chip serves no practical purpose.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh Toss a number of them into a Pokémon Den for the chance to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Wishing Chip serves no practical purpose. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh Toss a number of them into a Pokémon Den for the chance to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Unobtainable

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This item's name and description might indicate it was intended instead of the Wishing Piece . Additionally, in the Spanish name for the Wishing Chip, Trocito Deseo, the word trocito is a diminutive form of trozo , used in the name Trozo Deseo (Wishing Piece).
